name: POPKID-MD
description: POPKID MD - Multi-Device WhatsApp Bot Master Engine 2026 by Popkid Kenya 🇰🇪

SESSION_ID.description: Your MEGA session ID. Format: POPKID;;;xxxxxxx

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number with country code. Example: 254712345678

OWNER_NAME.description: Your name or bot owner name.

NON_PREFIX.description: Enable non-prefix commands. true or false.

ALWAYS_ONLINE.description: Keep bot always online. true or false.

AUTO_BIO.description: Auto update bio with time. true or false.

AUTO_READ_STATUS.description: Auto read/view statuses. true or false.

AUTO_REACT_STATUS.description: Auto react to statuses. true or false.

AUTO_READ.description: Auto read all messages. true or false.

AUTO_TYPING.description: Show typing indicator when receiving messages. true or false.

WELCOME.description: Enable welcome messages in groups. true or false.

GOODBYE.description: Enable goodbye messages in groups. true or false.

BOT_OFF.description: Turn bot off for non-owners. true or false.

RENDER_EXTERNAL_URL.description: Your Heroku app URL. Example: https://your-app.herokuapp.com
